claims.text: The global IT Service Management (ITSM) Software market size is anticipated to be valued at USD 9,773 million in 2025, with a projected growth to USD 36,569.3 million by 2034 at a CAGR of 15.8%.
claims.evidence: Global IT Service Management (ITSM) Software market size is anticipated to be valued at USD 9773 million in 2025, with a projected growth to USD 36569.3 million by 2034 at a CAGR of 15.8%.

claims.text: The global ITSM Software Market is expanding steadily as organizations adopt cloud-based service desks and AI-driven support tools, indicating a structural pain in managing IT services effectively.
claims.evidence: The global IT Service Management (ITSM) Software Market is expanding steadily as organizations across 120+ countries adopt cloud-based service desks, automated workflows, and AI-driven support tools to improve operational performance.

claims.text: There is a high willingness to pay for ITSM solutions, as evidenced by the significant adoption rates of multiple ITSM modules with reports of improved SLA compliance and reduction in service downtime.
claims.evidence: Approximately 55% of companies report improved SLA compliance after deploying ITSM solutions, while 48% experience a 20% reduction in service downtime.

claims.text: The ITSM software market is in a mature state, with over 72% of enterprises adopting ITSM solutions to enhance service delivery, indicating strong existing demand.
claims.evidence: The IT Service Management (ITSM) Software Market has experienced significant expansion driven by digital transformation strategies, where over 72% of enterprises adopt ITSM solutions to enhance service delivery.

claims.text: The ITSM market is exhibiting a strong competitive posture with many enterprises using at least one ITSM platform and companies integrating multiple tools for service delivery.
claims.evidence: Surveys show that 78% of enterprises use at least one ITSM platform, and 46% of companies employ three or more ITSM modules for service delivery, highlighting strong multi-tool adoption.
